title: Newly created issue card not rendered until manual reload
description: Observed in issues board: after creating a new story, existing cards shifted position but the new card did not render until a full manual reload. Expected: new card appears immediately in the correct column without reload. Actual: board layout updates (cards shift) but the new card is missing until reload. Repro: from issues view, create a new story; observe board; reload; new card appears.
creator: unknown

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Additional observation: when this bug issue was created, it also did not appear immediately on the board. Because it would have appeared at the bottom, no layout shift happened, so nothing changed on screen until a full page reload. After reload, the card appeared as expected. This reinforces that newly created cards are not rendered spontaneously.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Fixed intermittent issue visibility bug.

Root cause: Race condition between IssueCard's useLayoutEffect adding 'issue-animate-seed' class (opacity: 0) and useBoardTransitions' IntersectionObserver removing it to trigger animation.

Solution: Removed redundant animation class addition from IssueCard component. Cards now default to visible; animation is enhancement rather than requirement.

Side benefit: Also fixed collapse/expand column visibility issues.
